code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut c0 = 0
  mut c1 = 0
  mut c2 = 0
  mut c3 = 0
  mut c4 = 0
  mut c5 = 0
  mut c6 = 0
  mut c7 = 0
  mut c8 = 0
  mut c9 = 0

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      -1
    end
    if b == 48
      c0 = c0 + 1
    else if b == 49
      c1 = c1 + 1
    else if b == 50
      c2 = c2 + 1
    else if b == 51
      c3 = c3 + 1
    else if b == 52
      c4 = c4 + 1
    else if b == 53
      c5 = c5 + 1
    else if b == 54
      c6 = c6 + 1
    else if b == 55
      c7 = c7 + 1
    else if b == 56
      c8 = c8 + 1
    else if b == 57
      c9 = c9 + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut d = 0
  while d < 10
    let count = if d == 0
      c0
    else if d == 1
      c1
    else if d == 2
      c2
    else if d == 3
      c3
    else if d == 4
      c4
    else if d == 5
      c5
    else if d == 6
      c6
    else if d == 7
      c7
    else if d == 8
      c8
    else
      c9
    end

    mut bars = ""
    mut k = 0
    while k < count
      bars = "#{bars}#"
      k = k + 1
    end
    println("#{d}: #{bars}")
    d = d + 1
  end
end
